Package neqsim.process.safety.esd

Class EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalStats

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.esd.EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalStats
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
EmergencyShutdownTestResult
public static final class EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalStats extends Object implements Serializable
Monitored signal statistics over the ESD transient.
